overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy, neon-lit city street at night in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks along a wet sidewalk past a wrecked yellow car while vehicles drive by on the road, with the iconic CHOOH2 building visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with neon signage and passing traffic

events.description: white van drives past on the left and exits view
green truck enters from left and drives past in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, observing the passing vehicles and neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: white van driving past on the road
green truck driving past in the same direction

entered.detail: tall building with vertical neon CHOOH2 signage
abandoned yellow sports car with open doors on the sidewalk
tall street light with bright overhead lamp
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk
large glowing billboard with orange text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk city street at night. The player walks along a wet concrete sidewalk where a wrecked yellow car sits abandoned. A white van and green truck pass by on the multi-lane road to the left. Neon signs including a prominent CHOOH2 building sign illuminate the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching street light pole on urban sidewalk

events.description: camera passes very close to the street light pole which temporarily occludes the view

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward, approaching and passing the street light pole

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking along the sidewalk, approaching a tall street light pole. The wrecked yellow car recedes into the background on the right. The camera passes close by the pole around the 6.5 second mark, with the CHOOH2 sign remaining visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street continuing into the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sidewalk away from the passed landmarks

segments.scene_description: Having passed the street light pole and wrecked car, the player continues down the foggy sidewalk. The passed elements fall behind while the illuminated billboard remains visible ahead through the hazy night atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a foggy, neon-lit city street that gradually leaves behind urban wreckage for a deeper immersion into the hazy night. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk beside an abandoned yellow car, while a white van and green truck glide past on the adjacent multi-lane road under the glow of a prominent CHOOH2 sign. As the camera moves forward, the wrecked vehicle recedes into the background and the view shifts toward a tall street light pole. The scene then opens further as the camera passes the pole, leaving the wreckage behind while the illuminated billboard remains a distant beacon through the mist. Finally, the movement continues down the damp sidewalk, with the previous landmarks falling away into the thick, atmospheric fog.
